displayName: Eliza-1 Voice OmniVoice — frozen conditioning + samantha preset
purpose: Primary TTS for Eliza-1 — OmniVoice frozen-conditioning with samantha voice preset
architecture: OmniVoice (Qwen3-0.6B bidir LM + MaskGIT decoder + DAC vocoder)

files.notes: ELZ2 v2 preset: refAudioTokens + refText + instruct. Pre-encoded [K=8, ref_T] reference tokens for zero-encode-cost runtime.

notes: v0.1.1 (W3-4 samantha preset + FFI wiring). This is the PRIMARY samantha TTS path — OmniVoice frozen-conditioning with pre-encoded samantha reference tokens. Kokoro fine-tune is blocked on quality gate (W3-11). OmniVoice quantization: PolarQuant/TurboQuant applies to the Qwen3-0.6B LM; V-cache PolarQuant does NOT apply (MaskGIT has no KV cache). ABI v4 FFI bridge: eliza_inference_encode_reference / eliza_inference_free_tokens.
